zh.lifeSummary: 當Clemence de Orreby於1221年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Philip de Orreby II31歲，母親Leuca de Mohaut19歲。她於大約1232年與Robert de Banastre IV在英國英格蘭爾莫利頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1258年在英國英格蘭爾切斯特享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾切斯特 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clemence de Orreby于1221年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲Philip de Orreby II31岁，母亲Leuca de Mohaut19岁。她于大约1232年与Robert de Banastre IV在英国英格兰爾莫利頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1258年在英国英格兰爾切斯特享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾切斯特 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clemence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Clemence de Orreby was born in 1221, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, Philip de Orreby II, was 31 and her mother, Leuca de Mohaut, was 19. She married Robert de Banastre IV about 1232, in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1258, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Chester Cathedral, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clemence de Orreby est née en 1221, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip de Orreby II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Leuca de Mohaut, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Banastre IV environ 1232, à Mollington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1258, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Chester Cathedral, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clemence de Orreby 1221 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip de Orreby II 31 und ihre Mutter Leuca de Mohaut 19. Sie hat um 1232 in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Robert de Banastre IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1258 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chester Cathedral, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence de Orreby è nata il nel 1221 nel Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Philip de Orreby II, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Leuca de Mohaut, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Banastre IV circa 1232, nel Mollington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1258, nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Chester Cathedral, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Clemence de Orrebyが1221年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Philip de Orreby IIは31歳，母Leuca de Mohautは19歳であった。約1232年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモリントンでRobert de Banastre IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1258年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスター カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Clemence de Orreby(이)가 1221년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip de Orreby II(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Leuca de Mohaut(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1232년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모링턴에서 Robert de Banastre IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1258년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence de Orreby nasceu em 1221, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip de Orreby II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Leuca de Mohaut, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Banastre IV aproximadamente 1232, em Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1258, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Chester Cathedral, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clemence de Orreby родилась в 1221 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip de Orreby II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Leuca de Mohaut, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Banastre IV около 1232 г. в местности моллингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1258 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности честир кэтедраль, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clemence de Orreby nació en 1221, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip de Orreby II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Leuca de Mohaut, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Robert de Banastre IV aproximadamente 1232, en Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1258, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Chester Cathedral, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
